pkgmetadata.longdescription: claude-agent-tui is an ACP-over-PTY bridge that runs the official Claude Code TUI inside Zed's agent panel, driving the real 'claude' CLI over a pseudo-terminal and exposing it through the Agent Client Protocol. It runs on top of your existing Claude Pro/Max subscription. This package is a prebuilt bundle shipping the compiled dist/ output together with its node_modules (including the native node-pty addon), so no compilation happens at merge time.
